description: You are an embedded systems engineer sourcing components. Document the current price and stock status for the 'Raspberry Pi 5 8GB' from Adafruit, SparkFun, and DigiKey. Organize bookmarks for these product pages in a browser Favorites folder named 'SBC Tracking'. Save screenshots of the product pages to /home/ga/Pictures/Evidence/ named 'adafruit_pi5.png', 'sparkfun_pi5.png', and 'digikey_pi5.png'. Provide a summary report at /home/ga/Desktop/sourcing_report.txt including the Vendor Name, Current Price, and Stock Status for each distributor.

metadata.occupation_context: Embedded Systems Engineer - component sourcing and availability tracking
